title: St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor
tagline: St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Archi Episcopal Marian Pilgrim Forane Church Edoor is one of the oldest churches and a notable Marian pilgrim centre in Kannur district of Kerala. It is near Iritty, the eastern town of Kannur district. This church is the first church in the name of St.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Karikkottakary
topPlaces.description: Karikkottakary is a small town located 12 km (7.5 mi) east of Iritty in Kannur district, Kerala state. Karikkotakari revenue village is formed on 26 February 2021 by trifurcating Aralam and Ayyankunnu villages.

topPlaces.name: Uruppumkutty
topPlaces.description: Uruppumkutty is a small hamlet in Ayyankunnu Panchayat Iritty Taluk, Kannur District, Kerala State, India. Uruppumkutty is about 18 km from Iritty.

topPlaces.name: Payam, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Payam is a village and Grama Panchayat in Iritty taluk of Kannur district in Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Vilamana
topPlaces.description: Vilamana is a village in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ayyankunnu
topPlaces.description: Ayyankunnu is a village in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.The name Ayyankunnu came from the five hills "Anchu Kunnu".

topPlaces.name: Vallithode
topPlaces.description: Vallithode is a small town in the Iritty taluk of Kannur district in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Aralam
topPlaces.description: Aralam is a large village and grama panchayat in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Aralam grama panchayat borders Karnataka to the east.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Schools, Angadikadavu
topPlaces.description: Sacred Heart Schools, Angadikadavu is a K-12, mixed, government aided school under the Archdiocese of Thalassery. The campus includes Parish Church, Higher Secondary section, High school section, Primary school section and Kindergarten.

items.note: Karikkottakary is a small town located 12 km (7.5 mi) east of Iritty in Kannur district, Kerala state. Karikkotakari revenue village is formed on 26 February 2021 by trifurcating Aralam and Ayyankunnu villages.
Uruppumkutty is a small hamlet in Ayyankunnu Panchayat Iritty Taluk, Kannur District, Kerala State, India. Uruppumkutty is about 18 km from Iritty.
Payam is a village and Grama Panchayat in Iritty taluk of Kannur district in Indian state of Kerala.
Vilamana is a village in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Ayyankunnu is a village in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.The name Ayyankunnu came from the five hills "Anchu Kunnu".
Vallithode is a small town in the Iritty taluk of Kannur district in Kerala, India.
Aralam is a large village and grama panchayat in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Aralam grama panchayat borders Karnataka to the east.

Sacred Heart Schools, Angadikadavu is a K-12, mixed, government aided school under the Archdiocese of Thalassery. The campus includes Parish Church, Higher Secondary section, High school section, Primary school section and Kindergarten.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Forane Church Edoor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karikkottakary, Uruppumkutty, Payam, Kerala, Vilamana, Ayyankunnu.
